docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,000.00 FILED BY THEPKAYSONE, SAYSONGKHAM AS TO DEFENDANT THEPKAYSONE, SAYSANA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-27-2021 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF THEPKAYSONE, SAYSONGKHAM

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-27-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-27-2021 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF SAYSONGKHAM THEPKAYSONE IS PRESENT WITH WITNESSES DARLYNA THEPKAYSON, DAUGHTER AND DESIREE THEPKAYSONE. DEFENDANT SAYSANA THEPKAYSONE IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO PLAINTIFF THEPKAYSONE, SAYSONGKHAM
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$40.00) SERVED AUG-17-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT THEPKAYSONE, SAYSANA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THEPKAYSONE, SAYSONGKHAM RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THEPKAYSONE, SAYSANA $8,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $40.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,040.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-27-2021 - JUDGMENT.
